title: Endless Roll
description:
Cursed dice. One more descent.

Endless Roll is a minimalist score-attack survival roguelite where your dice pool is your body, your health, and your run. Each step, you choose a path, read the preview, roll into combat, hazards, or rituals, and live with the consequences. A wounded die shrinks. A corrupt die becomes volatile. Lose your last die and the descent ends.

The challenge is not building a character. It is keeping a collapsing system alive. Heal fractures, purge corruption, sacrifice dice for better odds, and decide when to play safe or push for bigger rewards. Draft run-only omens that bend the rules of a run, survive elite milestone fights every fifth floor, and descend deep enough to climb the leaderboard.

• Endless score-attack runs built around fast, readable encounters

• Your dice are persistent state: heal them, wound them, corrupt them, replace them, or lose them forever

• Truthful lane previews before each choice, so risk is visible before you commit

• Combat, hazards, and ritual events that constantly reshape your run

• Run-only omens and milestone elites that add new pressure and new ways to survive

• Push deeper, set new records, and climb the leaderboard
description_short: Your dice are your health in this endless survival roguelite. Pick a lane, manage wounds and corruption, draft omens, climb the leaderboard, and push for one more floor.
